allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude-mem" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem ".mcp.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "f:\\AI\\memory\\.mcp.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime 2>$null; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
